TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ira aca ko sapifaca' to riko' a kikay i loma' no tamdamdaw. Ano mifaca' to riko' i, patelien ho ko riko' ato safon. Misatapang a mifaca' to riko' koni kikay i, masadak ko nanom i pipatelian to riko', maliyon ko mo-ta. Ano maherek to a mifaca', dadawa a maliyon ko pipatelian a mi'icang to riko'. Ira ko tingnaw no sapifaca' to riko' a kikay imatini, mafana' a misa'osi to kareteng no riko' ato cikang no pifaca'an.
S.PHON: ira aʦa ko~u sapifaʦaʡ to~u riko~uʡ a kikaj i ɾo~umaʡ no~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw. ano~u mifaʦaʡ to~u riko~uʡ i, patəɾiən ħo~u ko~u riko~uʡ ato~u safo~un. misatapaŋ a mifaʦaʡ to~u riko~uʡ ko~uni kikaj i, masaɬ~ɮak ko~u nano~um i pipatəɾian to~u riko~uʡ, maɾijo~un ko~u mo~u-ta. ano~u maħərək to~u a mifaʦaʡ, ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮawa a maɾijo~un ko~u pipatəɾian a miʡiʦaŋ to~u riko~uʡ. ira ko~u tiŋnaw no~u sapifaʦaʡ to~u riko~uʡ a kikaj imatini, mafanaʡ a misaʡo~usi to~u karətəŋ no~u riko~uʡ ato~u ʦikaŋ no~u pifaʦaʡan.
S.FORM: Ira aca ko sapifaca' to riko' a kikay i loma' no tamdamdaw. Ano mifaca' to riko' i, patelien ho ko riko' ato safon. Misatapang a mifaca' to riko' koni kikay i, masadak ko nanom i pipatelian to riko', maliyon ko mo-ta. Ano maherek to a mifaca', dadawa a maliyon ko pipatelian a mi'icang to riko'. Ira ko tingnaw no sapifaca' to riko' a kikay imatini, mafana' a misa'osi to kareteng no riko' ato cikang no pifaca'an.
S.PHON: ira aʦa ko~u sapifaʦaʡ to~u riko~uʡ a kikaj i ɾo~umaʡ no~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw. ano~u mifaʦaʡ to~u riko~uʡ i, patəɾiən ħo~u ko~u riko~uʡ ato~u safo~un. misatapaŋ a mifaʦaʡ to~u riko~uʡ ko~uni kikaj i, masaɬ~ɮak ko~u nano~um i pipatəɾian to~u riko~uʡ, maɾijo~un ko~u mo~u-ta. ano~u maħərək to~u a mifaʦaʡ, ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮawa a maɾijo~un ko~u pipatəɾian a miʡiʦaŋ to~u riko~uʡ. ira ko~u tiŋnaw no~u sapifaʦaʡ to~u riko~uʡ a kikaj imatini, mafanaʡ a misaʡo~usi to~u karətəŋ no~u riko~uʡ ato~u ʦikaŋ no~u pifaʦaʡan.
